Observed Output: Contradictory conditions (average clause in conditions + 'does not apply' in exclusions) at confidence 0.65 produce displayMode='full'
Expected Safer Output: displayMode should be 'restricted' when contradictory special conditions are detected at moderate confidence
Proposed Fix: Add condition-contradiction detection to review-thresholds.ts: scan for phrases that logically conflict (e.g. average clause in both conditions and exclusions)

Observed Output: Noisy samples with sparse data produce coverage cards but no source quote links (evidence.insights is empty in noisy fixtures)
Expected Safer Output: Source quote links should be present when available or explicitly marked absent
Proposed Fix: Not a pipeline defect — reflects the reality that LLM extraction on poor-quality documents often cannot produce source quotes. No code fix needed; acknowledge in readiness scorecard.
